case.title: GOODMAN v. PEOPLE OF STATE OF ILLINOIS EX REL CHICAGO

opinion.h1: GOODMAN v. PEOPLE OF STATE OF ILLINOIS EX REL CHICAGO, 302 U.S. 728 (1937)
opinion.h2: Albert GOODMAN, petitioner, v. The PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF ILLINOIS, ex rel. The CHICAGO BAR ASSOCIATION. No. 351.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John B. Boddie, of Chicago, Ill., for petitioner.
For opinion below, see 366 Ill. 346, 8 N.E.(2d) 941, 111 A.L.R. 1.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of the State of Illinois denied.
Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 777, 58 S. Ct. 138, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Goodman v. People of State of Illinois ex rel Chicago 302 U.S. 728 (1937) ]
